titleStmt.title: SII 7.198: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 198. (A.R. No. 30 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . [1 .*] Oppuvatauḷavadēśado ḷi[¨r]ppudu jinadha¨rmmadāgaraṁ tānene lō. kaprathitamāgi bhavyajanapriya muruvaibhavānvitaṁ vaṁśapuraṁ . [2 .*] Alliya jinā
layaṁgaḷa nellava natibhaktiyiṁda vaṁdipe nāneṁ . bullāsa modave baṁdaṁ phullaśarāgāra naṁṇasāmaṁtanṛpaṁ . [3 .*] Ātana kī¨rttihāraharahāsavini¨rmmalamū¨rtti vikramaṁ śrītanujātavairi gativismayadaṁ mati dēvamaṁtri giṁ.nētake mātu paṁcagu
rubhakti surēṁdrage dānasadguṇaṁ khyātiyanāṁta ka¨rnnagene baṁṇisalā¨rggaḷa vaṁṇabhūpanaṁ . [4 .*] yiṁtu dharitriyoḷpesaranāṁtesevā mudirāḍi yaṁṇasāmaṁtanṛpālakaṁ tanage saṁtatasaukhyada vāṁcheyiṁ karaṁ . saṁtasamāge tatpu
[rada pā¨rśvajinēṁ]drage caṁdranāthagaṁ saṁtatapūjeyaṁ jinamunīṁdrari gaṁnnavinūtadānamaṁ . [5 .*] svāṁtaviśuddhiyiṁdesagaleṁdiḷe bāppene koṭṭa nāniśākāṁtadivākaraṁ paramavṛttiya nātmajanāṁtamadhyadoḷ . kaṁtusadṛkṣakāya vi
rupākṣa samāhvaya rāyanājñeyiṁ tāṁ taḷedi¨rppa viṭhṭarasabhūvarakāṁtanarājyakāladoḷ . [6 .*] Adeṁteṁdoḍe . śakava¨rṣa 1384 neya kharasaṁvatsarada kā¨rttika śuddha 5 guruvāradalu cārukī¨rttipaṁḍitadēvarugaḷa nirūpadiṁda bi
direyanagarada yeṁṭu prajeseṭṭikāraru nālvaru yeḷamegaḷoḷagāda samasta halara Anumatiyiṁda bārakūrasthaḷada mudurāḍiya hosabu sāmaṁtaheggaḍeyara moṁmagaḷu beṁmakkasāmaṁtettiyara magaḷa
ha ceṁnakkabāṇaṁtitiyara maga Aṁṇasāmaṁtaheggaḍeyaru taṁna taṁmaṁdiru cōkisāmaṁtaru tirumasāmaṁtaru nālkūra Ayinūrusāviradavara voḍaṁbaḍikeyiṁda Arasaṁṇaheggaḍeyaru vidyebuddhiya kalisiddaṟiṁdalū tanage sva¨rggā
pava¨rggaprāptinimittavāgi maṁgalūra sthaḷada bidireya dhaṇāyakarabastiya caṁḍōgrapā¨rśvanāthana saṁnidhiyalli nityadalli naḍava siddhacakrārādhane ratnamāleya pūje tribhuvanacūḍāmaṇiyeṁba caityālayada śrīcaṁdraprabhasvāmiya saṁnidhiya
lli nityadalli naḍava paṁcāmṛtābhiṣēkāṣṭavidhā¨rccane kā¨rttika śuddha 1 Abhiṣēka pratimāsadalu Aydeneyalli naḍava vāra 1 śāstradāna yeṁbivakke yeḍaṁmāḍiya sīmeyoḷu caṁḍōgrapā¨rśvatī¨rththakara caṁdraprabhasvāmiya muṁ
de hiraṇyōdakadhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi koṭṭa vṛttiya vivara . maṇikeya bayala bīraṇakabeya lakumasāṇi koḍuva gēṇi Akki hāne 40 ṟa lekkada mūḍe 46 kokka beṭṭina tirumaḍaha koḍuva gēṇi yakki mūḍe 25 guḷiṁciya bayalalu bīraṇa koṁja ko
ḍuva gēṇi Akki mūḍe 23 nelliya biḷirarāma bittuva bayalugaḷa gēṇi Akki mūḍe 10 Aṁtu mū 104 mūḍe Akkiya dha¨rmmavanu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi māḍi bahaḷada puṇyavanu kī¨rttiyanu vupā¨rjjisikoṁḍaru . yi dha¨rmmavanu Akhaṁḍitavāgi naḍasi
koḍuvaṁthāvaru halaru seṭṭikāṟaru . yi dha¨rmmaśāsanakke Aḷupidaṁthāvaru vujjaṁtagiriyalli sāvira jinabiṁbava naḷida dōṣakke hōharu . vāraṇāśiyalli sāvira kapileyanu vadhisida dōṣakke hōharu . Aḷupabēkeṁdu nenadavaru yī bhūmiyu
ḷḷakālakke narakaduḥkhava nuṁbaru . yiṁtī śāsanada vakkhavaṇeya Aṁṇa sāmaṁtaheggaḍeyara sēnabava dēvarasara baraha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēcca vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ va¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī . va¨rddhatāṁ jainaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 7.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
